name: Bankruptcy Law Offices of Mark L. Miller
description_short: San Diego and El Centro bankruptcy law firm offering Chapter 7, 13, and 11 filings with a claimed 98.9% success rate and 20+ years of experience.
description_long:
Bankruptcy Law Offices of Mark L. Miller is a bankruptcy law firm operating in San Diego and El Centro, California, led by attorney Mark L. Miller. The firm emphasizes personalized service as a small, hands-on practice rather than a high-volume bankruptcy mill. According to their website, they have filed numerous bankruptcy cases and maintain over 85 five-star Google reviews.

The firm offers comprehensive bankruptcy services across multiple chapters: Chapter 7 bankruptcy for rapid debt discharge, Chapter 13 bankruptcy for asset retention and debt repayment plans, and Chapter 11 bankruptcy for business restructuring. Beyond bankruptcy filings, they provide creditor harassment defense, foreclosure prevention, debt assessment, document preparation, trustee and creditor communication, and court representation. They advertise free initial consultations with licensed bankruptcy attorneys.

Key distinguishing factors include their claim of more than 50 years of collective team experience, willingness to litigate against creditors who harass clients before and after filing, and stated commitment to transparent pros-and-cons evaluation before recommending bankruptcy. They operate dual locations to serve both San Diego and Imperial County residents, with separate phone lines for each office.

The firm's marketing relies heavily on success rate claims (98.9%) and case volume statistics, though specific case outcomes, client testimonials beyond star ratings, and detailed fee structures are not provided on the website. Potential clients should verify licensing, request detailed fee agreements, and understand that bankruptcy outcomes depend heavily on individual circumstances rather than attorney success rates alone.
address: 2341 Jefferson St STE 100, San Diego, CA 92110

company_info.headquarters: 2341 Jefferson St STE 100, San Diego, CA 92110

pros: Offers free initial consultation with licensed bankruptcy attorney (not just staff)
Claims 98.9% success rate with 20+ years combined team experience
Dual location service (San Diego and El Centro) for geographic accessibility
Explicitly states they will litigate against creditors for harassment violations
Advertises as small hands-on firm, not a bankruptcy mill operation
Covers full range of bankruptcy chapters (7, 11, and 13) plus related services
Over 85 five-star Google reviews according to website
cons: Website contains placeholder text ('WE'VE FILED 0+ SAN DIEGO BANKRUPTCY CASES') suggesting outdated or incomplete information
Success rate claims (98.9%) lack specificity and may not be independently verified or standardized across the legal industry
No detailed fee structure, payment plans, or cost breakdown provided on website
Limited attorney information beyond names; no individual attorney credentials, bar numbers, or specialization details visible
No client testimonial excerpts or case study details provided to substantiate marketing claims
best_for: San Diego and El Centro residents facing Chapter 7 liquidation or asset protection through Chapter 13
Homeowners seeking foreclosure defense or loan modification alternatives
Consumers experiencing active creditor harassment, wage garnishment, or collection lawsuits
Small business owners considering Chapter 11 restructuring in California
diagnosis: Best for San Diego and El Centro residents who need full-service bankruptcy representation and want a local, personalized approach rather than high-volume processing. Primary caveat: verify current case outcomes and fee structures directly with the firm, as website marketing claims lack independent verification and the site contains placeholder content suggesting incomplete information maintenance.
services: Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing and debt repayment plan management
Creditor harassment defense and anti-harassment litigation
Financial situation assessment and document gathering
Trustee and creditor communication and negotiation
Service in San Diego and El Centro jurisdictions
